mapper.select: select t.*, w.id as w_id, w.code as warehouse_code, w.name as warehouse_name from purchase_forecast_task t left join fd_warehouse w on w.id = t.warehouse_id where t.id = #{id} and (t.del_flag is null or t.del_flag = '0') and t.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select e.*, m.code as material_code, m.name as material_name, m.speci, m.model, m.min_package_qty, m.is_gz, u.unit_name, s.name as supplier_name from purchase_forecast_entry e left join fd_material m on m.id = e.material_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_supplier s on s.id = e.supplier_id where e.task_id = #{taskId} and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag = '0') and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} order by e.id

select e.*, m.code as material_code, m.name as material_name, m.speci, m.model, m.min_package_qty, m.is_gz, u.unit_name, s.name as supplier_name from purchase_forecast_entry e left join fd_material m on m.id = e.material_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_supplier s on s.id = e.supplier_id where e.id = #{id} and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag = '0') and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into purchase_forecast_entry ( task_id, warehouse_id, material_id, supplier_id, stock_qty, in_transit_qty, avg_daily_qty, lower_limit, upper_limit, rop_qty, suggest_qty, confirm_qty, selected, price, formula_remark, tenant_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values
( #{e.taskId}, #{e.warehouseId}, #{e.materialId}, #{e.supplierId}, #{e.stockQty}, #{e.inTransitQty}, #{e.avgDailyQty}, #{e.lowerLimit}, #{e.upperLimit}, #{e.ropQty}, #{e.suggestQty}, #{e.confirmQty}, #{e.selected}, #{e.price}, #{e.formulaRemark}, #{e.tenantId}, '0', #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime}, #{e.remark} )
